profiles.label: Glutamate
profiles.mode_summary: Fast excitatory propagation with strong warm pulses and broad downstream activation.

profiles.label: GABA
profiles.mode_summary: Dominant inhibition with cool pulses, stronger suppression, and reduced downstream carryover.

profiles.label: Dopamine
profiles.mode_summary: Modulatory gain mode with selective amplification in high-weight pathways and delayed decay.

profiles.label: Acetylcholine
profiles.mode_summary: Task-focused modulatory/excitatory mode with sharper propagation and boosted relay precision.

profiles.label: Serotonin
profiles.mode_summary: Context-stabilizing modulation with softer pulses and dampened high-amplitude transitions.
